description: Prosafe SE, together with its subsidiaries, owns and operates semi-submersible accommodation vessels in South America, North America, and Europe. The company is also involved in the maintenance and modification of installations on fields for the production, hook-up and commissioning of new fields, tiebacks to existing infrastructure, and decommissioning activities. It owns and operates a fleet of five semi-submersible accommodation, safety, and support vessels; and two new build accommodation vessels at the yard. The company primarily serves oil and gas industries. Prosafe SE was founded in 1972 and is based in Oslo, Norway.
